category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison — China export to Qatar.

target_market_label.zh: 吉尔吉斯斯坦（Kyrgyzstandart / 国家能源控股）
target_market_label.zht: 吉爾吉斯斯坦（Kyrgyzstandart / 國家能源控股）

title.en: China-to-Kyrgyzstan EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入吉尔吉斯斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入吉爾吉斯斯坦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China EV charger documentation against Kyrgyzstan Kyrgyzstandart / GOST / IEC expectations, EAEU TR CU 004/2011 low-voltage safety and TR CU 020/2011 EMC conformity with EAC marking, NEHC and grid-subsidiary project coordination, IEC 61851 safety, IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 connector alignment, OCPP interoperability, cold-climate and high-altitude operating factors, and China GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与吉尔吉斯斯坦Kyrgyzstandart / GOST / IEC预期、EAEU TR CU 004/2011低压安全和TR CU 020/2011电磁兼容EAC标志合格评定、NEHC及电网子公司项目协调、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口匹配、OCPP互操作、寒冷气候和高海拔运行因素，以及中国GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基线的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與吉爾吉斯斯坦Kyrgyzstandart / GOST / IEC預期、EAEU TR CU 004/2011低壓安全和TR CU 020/2011電磁相容EAC標誌合格評定、NEHC及電網子公司項目協調、IEC 61851安全、IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2接口匹配、OCPP互操作、寒冷氣候和高海拔運行因素，以及中國GB/T 18487 / GB/T 20234 / GB/T 27930基線的差距對照。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Kyrgyzstan, the confirmed practical gates are EAEU conformity for in-scope electrical products because Kyrgyzstan is an EAEU member, including TR CU 004/2011 low-voltage safety, TR CU 020/2011 EMC, and EAC marking; Kyrgyzstandart / GOST / IEC documentation where adopted or requested; project-level coordination with NEHC and the relevant grid subsidiary for 220/380 V, 50 Hz connection; and cold-climate / high-altitude operating confirmation. Kyrgyzstan's EV market is still nascent, and GB/T charging interfaces may appear because of China proximity and Chinese vehicle imports, but IEC 62196 Type 2 AC and CCS2 DC alignment is the safer internationally interoperable route for public or mixed-fleet projects. A China GB/T-only charger using GB/T 20234 connectors and GB/T 27930 DC communication is physically and protocol-incompatible with IEC 62196 / CCS2 deployments and needs hardware, firmware, labelling, and test-documentation changes before it can be treated as Kyrgyzstan-ready.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造电动汽车充电桩进入吉尔吉斯斯坦时，已确认的实务门槛包括：由于吉尔吉斯斯坦是EAEU成员国，范围内电气产品须走EAEU合格评定，包括TR CU 004/2011低压安全、TR CU 020/2011电磁兼容和EAC标志；在已采纳或项目要求时准备Kyrgyzstandart / GOST / IEC文件；针对220/380 V、50 Hz接入与NEHC及相关电网子公司进行项目级协调；并确认寒冷气候和高海拔运行能力。吉尔吉斯斯坦电动车市场仍处于早期，因靠近中国和中国车辆进口，GB/T接口可能存在，但对公共或混合车队项目而言，IEC 62196 Type 2交流和CCS2直流路线更符合国际互操作预期。仅支持中国GB/T的充电桩使用GB/T 20234接口和GB/T 27930直流通信，与IEC 62196 / CCS2部署在物理和协议上不兼容，须完成硬件、固件、标签和测试文件变更后，才可视为面向吉尔吉斯斯坦的方案。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造電動汽車充電樁進入吉爾吉斯斯坦時，已確認的實務門檻包括：由於吉爾吉斯斯坦是EAEU成員國，範圍內電氣產品須走EAEU合格評定，包括TR CU 004/2011低壓安全、TR CU 020/2011電磁相容和EAC標誌；在已採納或項目要求時準備Kyrgyzstandart / GOST / IEC文件；針對220/380 V、50 Hz接入與NEHC及相關電網子公司進行項目級協調；並確認寒冷氣候和高海拔運行能力。吉爾吉斯斯坦電動車市場仍處於早期，因靠近中國和中國車輛進口，GB/T接口可能存在，但對公共或混合車隊項目而言，IEC 62196 Type 2交流和CCS2直流路線更符合國際互操作預期。僅支持中國GB/T的充電樁使用GB/T 20234接口和GB/T 27930直流通訊，與IEC 62196 / CCS2部署在物理和協議上不兼容，須完成硬體、韌體、標籤和測試文件變更後，才可視為面向吉爾吉斯斯坦的方案。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, EAEU technical-regulation scope determination, EAC certificate or declaration, Kyrgyzstandart approval, NEHC or grid-operator connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, charge-point operators, and installers should verify the current EAEU conformity route, Kyrgyzstandart / GOST / IEC standard adoption, grid-operator project requirements, and installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、EAEU技术法规适用范围裁定、EAC证书或声明、Kyrgyzstandart批准、NEHC或电网运营商接入批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、充电点运营商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行EAEU合格评定路径、Kyrgyzstandart / GOST / IEC标准采纳情况、电网运营商项目要求及安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、EAEU技術法規適用範圍裁定、EAC證書或聲明、Kyrgyzstandart批准、NEHC或電網運營商接入批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、充電點運營商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行EAEU合格評定路徑、Kyrgyzstandart / GOST / IEC標準採納情況、電網運營商項目要求及安裝規則。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, utility, customs authority, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
